name: kakaotalk-auto-reconstructed
description: macOS-local KakaoTalk auto-send app rebuilt around AppleScript automation.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/cli/send-now.js && node --check src/cli/rooms.js && node --check src/cli/analyze.js && node --check src/cli/tui.js && node --check src/desktop/main.js && node --check src/desktop/preload.js && node --check src/desktop/renderer/app.js && node --check src/macos/automation-driver.js && node --check src/macos/osascript.js
